title: oberonia borneensis
intro: Oberonia borneensis is a type of orchid plant species found in the tropical regions of Borneo. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Oberonia borneensis can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and in some cultures, it is also used as a poultice or applied topically to the skin.
